name: emoji-picker-element

en.when_to_use: Place it anywhere users need to choose emoji (reactions, chat, status, tags). It is a framework-independent custom element: instantiate it and listen for the emoji-click event, matching the catalog's JS-mount custom-element model. Note that runtime fetches the emoji dataset and caches it in IndexedDB.
en.why_valuable: A real emoji picker packages the full Unicode emoji dataset, category labels, search/keyword indexes, skin-tone variants, recent usage, and virtual scrolling for roughly 1,800 glyphs; AI cannot hand-write this data-intensive pipeline in a conversation.

data_in.note: No dataset is required because the library includes the full emoji catalog; fields are mostly constructor options/properties. Import has a side effect: it automatically calls customElements.define('emoji-picker'). There is no default export (named Picker/Database). Selection is reported through the 'emoji-click' event -> e.detail.unicode (character) / e.detail.emoji (object). At runtime it fetches emoji data from jsDelivr by default and caches it in IndexedDB.

schema.dataSource?: string -- emoji data URL; fetched from jsDelivr by default. A host that blocks connect-src must provide its own reachable URL
schema.skinToneEmoji?: string -- emoji used by the skin-tone picker
schema.customEmoji?: { name, shortcodes, url }[] -- custom emoji; none by default
schema.emojiVersion?: number -- for example 14.0; fixes the maximum supported version

spec.note: Custom element; give the host an explicit pixel height (400px in the example) or control it with the element's CSS variables. Do not use vh.

when_to_use: 凡是用户要挑 emoji 处(反应、聊天、状态、标签)直接放它;它是框架无关的自定义元素——实例化后监听 emoji-click 事件,契合目录 JS-mount 自定义元素模型。注意运行时会拉取 emoji 数据集并用 IndexedDB 缓存。
why_valuable: 真正的 emoji 选择器打包了全量 Unicode emoji 数据集、分类标签、搜索/关键词索引、肤色变体、最近使用、约 1800 个字形的虚拟滚动;这套数据密集的管线 AI 无法在对话内手写。

data_in.note: 无需传数据集,库内置全量 emoji;字段多为构造项/属性。import 有副作用:自动 customElements.define('emoji-picker')。无 default 导出(named Picker/Database)。选中经 'emoji-click' 事件 → e.detail.unicode(字符)/e.detail.emoji(对象)。运行时默认从 jsDelivr 拉 emoji 数据 + IndexedDB 缓存。

schema.dataSource?: string —— emoji 数据 URL;默认从 jsDelivr 拉取,宿主禁 connect-src 时须自备可达 URL
schema.skinToneEmoji?: string —— 肤色选择器用的 emoji
schema.customEmoji?: { name, shortcodes, url }[] —— 自定义 emoji,默认无
schema.emojiVersion?: number —— 如 14.0,固定最大支持版本

spec.note: 自定义元素;给 host 显式像素高(示例 400px)或用其 CSS 变量控制,禁 vh。

uplink: 选中 emoji 由消费 AI 在 'emoji-click' 回调里取 e.detail.unicode/emoji 并按载体外传;不预设统一契约。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested;并注意运行时 fetch 数据集 + IndexedDB 可能被宿主 CSP/sandbox 阻断
carriers.widget: supported(DOM):自包含自定义元素、自带 shadow root、零全局足迹;但需宿主允许 connect-src 拉数据 + IndexedDB
carriers.codex: supported:网络可达时直接注册并挂载

isolation.evidence: +esm named exports {Picker, Database}(无 default),import 时自注册 customElements.define('emoji-picker', Picker);Picker extends HTMLElement 自带 shadow root。构造项/属性 {dataSource, locale, i18n, skinToneEmoji, customEmoji, emojiVersion} 与事件 'emoji-click'(detail {emoji, skinTone, unicode})已验证(picker.d.ts、shared.d.ts:68/87)。globalStyleInjection=no & globalDomMutation=no:document.head 写入 0;样式在自有 shadow root 内;唯一一次 document.body 触碰是 emoji 渲染能力探测的临时节点(用后移除)。globalEvents=no:0 window/document addEventListener(监听器绑在自有 shadow 内容)。shadowCompatible=yes:完全自包含自定义元素,零全局 DOM/样式足迹。CAVEAT(运行时,非 DOM):默认 dataSource 从 jsDelivr 拉 emoji 数据集并用 IndexedDB 缓存——严格宿主 CSP(connect-src)或沙箱 iframe(IndexedDB)可能阻断;宿主禁外部 fetch 时须提供可达 dataSource 或本地数据。
